reason: Verified that the QA-20260721-023808-gf0j agent can receive and respond to a math question correctly, returning the answer "4" to "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut application with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260721-023808-gf0j" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded and displayed with "idle" status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the status indicator
Clicked the message input field — Input field became active and focused
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered in the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message sent and session created (session URL: /sessions/d0c56ad3-df15-459c-ac5a-daa9a7d9d4e9)
Waited for response — Agent responded almost immediately (within 1 second as shown by "Worked for 1s")
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays "4" in the chat, confirming the correct mathematical answer was provided
